Research

PRSG Lab studies measurement, mapping, and interpretation methods for geospatial information from images, sensors, and spatial datasets.

Image

Photogrammetry

Camera geometry, image orientation, dense matching, and measurement from imagery.

Camera calibration Bundle adjustment Image matching
Image

Remote Sensing

Analysis of satellite and airborne observations for environmental and infrastructure applications.

Multispectral imagery Change detection Earth observation
Image

Geoinformatics / GIS

Spatial databases, geospatial workflows, and map-based decision support.

GIS Spatial modeling Geospatial standards
Image

Satellite Image Geometry

Geometric modeling, correction, and validation of satellite imagery.

Sensor models Orthorectification Accuracy assessment
Image

UAV Mapping

Low-altitude image acquisition and mapping using unmanned aerial vehicles.

Flight planning Structure from motion Mapping accuracy
Image

LiDAR and Point Cloud Processing

Processing, registration, classification, and interpretation of 3D point clouds.

Registration Classification 3D features
Image

3D Reconstruction

Reconstruction of terrain, buildings, and infrastructure from multi-source observations.

Surface modeling Reality capture Digital twins
Image

Spatial Data Analysis

Quantitative analysis of spatial patterns, uncertainty, and geospatial data quality.

Spatial statistics Uncertainty Data quality

Department of Civil Engineering, Jeonbuk National University

567, Baekje-daero, Deokjin-gu, Jeonju-si, Jeonbuk-do, Republic of Korea
